page: The Microsoft Azure M96bs_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MBSMediumMemoryv3 server family. It is powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8473C processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 4.0 GHz. The server features 96 virtual CPUs mapped to 48 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. It is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per virtual core. This instance does not include local storage or onboard GPUs, relying instead on external block storage and premium storage capabilities.

Benchmark evaluations indicate top-tier capabilities across memory and multi-threaded operations. The server achieved a PassMark CPU score of 97,408.44 and a multi-core Geekbench score of 20,564.0, placing it in the top tier of tested hardware. Memory performance is exceptionally strong, with read-only cached small block bandwidth reaching 7,448.22 GB/sec and uncached large block write bandwidth at 184.37 GB/sec. The processor's advanced instruction sets, including AVX-512 and Intel AMX, contribute to a PassMark extended instructions score of 121,966.92 and strong performance in LLM inference tasks, such as processing 255.25 tokens per second on a medium 7B model.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the M96bs_v3 offers high resource density and compute capabilities suited for enterprise-scale workloads, though the lack of local NVMe storage requires external storage provisioning which may impact overall I/O latency and architectural complexity. The server is highly optimized for memory-intensive applications, large-scale database operations, high-throughput web serving, and multi-threaded data processing tasks.
description: The Microsoft Azure M96bs_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MBSMediumMemoryv3 family, powered by a dedicated 4.0 GHz Intel Xeon 8473C processor. It features 96 vCPUs (48 physical cores) and 768.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. While it lacks local storage and GPUs, it supports premium block storage. Benchmark results place this server in the top tier for memory bandwidth, multi-core CPU performance, and database operations, with a PassMark CPU score of 97,408.44 and a multi-core Geekbench score of 20,564.0. The inclusion of Intel AMX and AVX-512 instruction sets drives strong performance in complex mathematical computations and LLM inference. This server is highly suited for large-scale databases, memory-intensive enterprise applications, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M96bs_v3 is a memory-optimized server with 96 vCPUs and 768 GB RAM, powered by a 4.0 GHz Intel Xeon CPU. It delivers top-tier memory bandwidth and database performance for enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M96bs_v3 is a memory-optimized server featuring 96 vCPUs, 768 GB RAM, and a 4.0 GHz Intel Xeon CPU for enterprise database workloads.
tagline: A high-density, memory-optimized virtual server featuring ninety-six virtual cores and advanced instruction sets for demanding enterprise database workloads.
bullet_points: 96 vCPUs and 768.0 GB of RAM powered by a 4.0 GHz Intel Xeon 8473C processor.
Top-tier memory bandwidth reaching up to 7,448.22 GB/sec for cached reads.
Intel AMX and AVX-512 support for accelerated mathematical and inference workloads.
Optimized for premium block storage with no local storage overhead.
Best suited for large-scale databases, memory-intensive enterprise applications, and web serving.
